description: Portable or online vibration monitoring for rotating equipment
Point temperature measurement for bearings motors gearboxes and process-related assets
Infrared thermal inspection for electrical mechanical and process hotspots
Lubricant condition monitoring including viscosity water particle count wear metals and contamination
Ultrasonic inspection for leaks bearing lubrication electrical discharge and friction
Structured visual inspection for leakage cracks corrosion belt damage loose bolts and abnormal conditions
Operating and process context such as pressure flow temperature speed current and production rate
